greeting.text: Ah. A new seeker. Everything here has a price. Some prices are visible.
You return. The desperate always do.
Three visits. You are either wealthy in knowledge or bankrupt in options.
I have nothing left to sell you that you can afford. But let us pretend.

on_purchase.card: That one wanted to be found. Cards choose their wielders, down here.
on_purchase.relic: It will serve you. For now. Relics have their own loyalties.
on_purchase.heal: The wound closes. The memory of it does not.
on_purchase.expensive_item: A significant investment. The dungeon respects commitment. So, reluctantly, do I.
on_purchase.browsing_only: Browse freely. The price of looking is only what you carry away in your memory.

farewell.default: The dungeon always has more to sell. Whether you can afford it is another matter.
farewell.hp_low: Survive. I prefer return customers to corpses. Corpses pay poorly.
farewell.no_purchase: Next time. Or not — the dungeon has ways of encouraging return visits.
farewell.all_purchased: You have bought everything. I admire the thoroughness. Come back when you have found more gold — or more time.

lore_aside: Every item here came from someone who did not survive to reclaim it. I prefer to think of myself as a custodian.
The dungeon and I have an arrangement. I do not ask what happens in its deeper levels. It does not interfere with commerce.
I have been selling in this place since the fourth age of the archive. My inventory has improved. My clientele has not.
The last seeker who asked where my goods came from did not leave this shop. I have answered the question more carefully since.

stateReactive.hp_low: You look like the last one. They did not make it past the next floor.
stateReactive.hp_full: Untouched? Impressive. Or perhaps the dungeon simply hasn't tried yet.
stateReactive.many_relics: Quite the collection. Careful — relics remember their previous owners. Not all memories are kind.
stateReactive.no_gold: Empty pockets. The dungeon provides, but it always collects.
stateReactive.high_mastery: You know things. I can see the weight of it. Knowledge that heavy tends to attract interest — not all of it friendly.
stateReactive.streak_active: You have been answering correctly. The dungeon notices. So do I.
